name: BMI Calculator for Men
description: Estimate BMI and see standard male BMI category ranges.
formulaDescription: BMI uses height and weight to estimate body composition.

example.explanation: A 175cm, 80kg man has a BMI of 26.12 which is considered overweight.

faqs.question: Does BMI account for muscle mass?
faqs.answer: No, BMI is a simple ratio and does not distinguish between muscle and fat.
